sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 382 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.8 & 29. 2. For hearing of CMA No.2609/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 08.12.2025 Mr. Taimoor Ahmad Qureshi, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Faheem Raza Khuhro, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent, same is taken on record. Pursuant to order dated 01.12.2025, learned counsel for the respondent states that it may be in the interest of justice and all parties for impugned order to be set aside and the matter be remanded back to the Appellate Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
